old_value: {"id":"capnp-deno-v0y","title":"Design first-class WebSocket service API for TCP-unavailable clients","description":"Specify and prototype high-level DX API parallel to TCP helpers (e.g., WS.connect/WS.serve or equivalent) built on existing WebSocketTransport and RpcServerRuntime surfaces. Include transport options, subprotocol support, and migration path from manual wiring.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"nullstyle@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T20:01:43Z","created_by":"Scott Fleckenstein","updated_at":"2026-03-04T20:01:43Z"}

{"id":"capnp-deno-iey","title":"Define browser\u003c-\u003eDeno WebSocket handshake and runtime wiring contract","description":"Document and validate required wiring: Deno.upgradeWebSocket to WebSocketTransport to RpcServerRuntime.createWithRoot, bootstrap requirements, frame-limit policy, and close/error behavior expectations across browser and Deno runtimes.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"nullstyle@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T20:01:47Z","created_by":"Scott Fleckenstein","updated_at":"2026-03-04T20:01:47Z"}

{"id":"capnp-deno-ph4","title":"Build WebSocket RPC lifecycle and reconnect integration matrix","description":"Add/plan real WebSocket integration scenarios for bootstrap/call/finish/release parity, reconnect behavior, capability remap semantics, subprotocol negotiation, and binary payload compatibility (ArrayBuffer/Blob).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"nullstyle@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T20:01:45Z","created_by":"Scott Fleckenstein","updated_at":"2026-03-04T20:01:45Z"}

{"id":"capnp-deno-4jp","title":"Publish browser fallback guidance and wire integration tasks","description":"Add docs for browser\u003c-\u003eDeno fallback order, reconnect layering, subprotocol policy, and capability-scope caveats. Update integration task entrypoints so new WebSocket scenarios run in CI/integration lane.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"nullstyle@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T20:01:45Z","created_by":"Scott Fleckenstein","updated_at":"2026-03-04T20:01:45Z"}

{"id":"capnp-deno-0on","title":"Add capnp_shutdown ABI support to TypeScript","description":"In src/wasm/abi.ts: add capnp_shutdown?(): void to CapnpWasmExports, hasShutdown to WasmAbiCapabilities, wire up detection in detectCapabilities, validate in getCapnpWasmExports, add shutdown() method to WasmAbi class.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"nullstyle@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T03:15:52Z","created_by":"Scott Fleckenstein","updated_at":"2026-03-03T03:15:52Z"}

{"id":"capnp-deno-h6t","title":"Update mise.toml zig version to master","description":"Change zig = 0.15.2 to zig = master in mise.toml to match upstream capnp-zig requirements. Verify with mise install \u0026\u0026 zig version.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"nullstyle@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T03:14:56Z","created_by":"Scott Fleckenstein","updated_at":"2026-03-03T03:14:56Z"}

{"id":"capnp-deno-bxu","title":"Bump capnp-zig submodule to b23b785","description":"Update vendor/capnp-zig submodule pointer to latest main (b23b785). {"id":"capnp-deno-86z","title":"Build WASM artifact with new capnp-zig and zig master","description":"Run CAPNPC_ZIG_ROOT=vendor/capnp-zig deno task build:wasm after submodule + zig update. Verify generated/capnp_deno.wasm is produced (~150KB). Inspect exports with deno eval to confirm capnp_shutdown is present.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"nullstyle@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T03:15:52Z","created_by":"Scott Fleckenstein","updated_at":"2026-03-03T03:15:52Z"}

{"id":"capnp-deno-byc","title":"Update CI zig cache paths for Zig 0.16","description":"In .github/workflows/ci.yml, update real-wasm job cache paths: zig-cache -\u003e .zig-cache (Zig 0.16 renamed the local cache directory).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"nullstyle@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T03:15:52Z","created_by":"Scott Fleckenstein","updated_at":"2026-03-03T03:15:52Z"}
